tools.name: agent.message
tools.description: Send message to a named agent

tools.name: agent.spawn
tools.description: Spawn a host agent: {host, archetype, prompt, traits, model, budget}

tools.name: agent.status
tools.description: List running agents + states

tools.name: compress.run
tools.description: Compress large text, JSON, code, or logs and return a retrieval reference

tools.name: gov.cve_lookup
tools.description: Scan a project directory for vulnerable dependencies via OSV/CVE

tools.name: gov.events
tools.description: Query the signed audit/event log (since / by agent / by type) from the store

tools.name: gov.health
tools.description: Doctor / status across substrate, hosts, MCP, daemon

tools.name: gov.replay
tools.description: Replay a session or task trace from events and artifacts

tools.name: gov.report
tools.description: Generate a governance report with quality and benchmark signals

tools.name: gov.swarm_history
tools.description: Inspect recent swarm run history and learning outcomes

tools.name: gov.swarm_plan
tools.description: Return a concrete swarm role/phase plan for a proposed task

tools.name: gov.swarm_policy
tools.description: Inspect learned swarm policy entries and topology preferences

tools.name: gov.swarm_recommendation
tools.description: Recommend swarm topology and assignment hints for a proposed task

tools.name: gov.swarm_status
tools.description: Summarize the active swarm with a suggested plan overlay

tools.name: gov.witness_verify
tools.description: Verify .rvf signature chain

tools.name: hooks.post
tools.description: Unified post-hook with outcome — feeds SONA learning

tools.name: hooks.pre
tools.description: Unified pre-hook (task|edit|command) — returns routing + context

tools.name: hooks.route
tools.description: Get model + archetype recommendation for a task

tools.name: intel.intent_search
tools.description: Search durable goals, preferences, and recurring workflows

tools.name: intel.intent_store
tools.description: Persist a stable goal or preference into intent memory

tools.name: intel.pattern_search
tools.description: Find similar past trajectories (4-step retrieve phase)

tools.name: intel.pattern_store
tools.description: Store outcome for the distill/consolidate phases

tools.name: intel.repo_inspect
tools.description: Snapshot repo health: hotspots, test gaps, and domain counts

tools.name: memory.list
tools.description: List entries in a namespace with filters

tools.name: memory.retrieve
tools.description: Get a single entry by key

tools.name: memory.search
tools.description: Hybrid search — fuses dense vectors (HNSW/RaBitQ/ACORN) with BM25 lexical ranking (RRF), then MMR diversity + recency; optional filter_tags restricts to entries with all given tags, and optional feedback:[{key,useful}] trains a bandit that reweights future results

tools.name: memory.store
tools.description: Insert/update an entry with optional embedding + tags

tools.name: orchestrate.run
tools.description: Run a multi-agent pipeline. A GOAP (A*) planner computes the archetype sequence from a template (feature/bugfix/refactor/security/sparc) or a caller-supplied goal + capabilities; static templates are the fallback

tools.name: plugin.invoke
tools.description: Run a plugin command (shell exec via tokio)

tools.name: plugin.list
tools.description: Installed plugins + skills (discovered from disk)

tools.name: relay.announce
tools.description: Register/refresh this instance's presence for cross-instance discovery

tools.name: relay.contract_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a contract with a decision and handoff

tools.name: relay.contract_store
tools.description: Persist a durable ownership / handoff contract

tools.name: relay.contracts
tools.description: List stored collaboration contracts

tools.name: relay.list
tools.description: Discover other live instances (scope: machine|directory|repo) + drain own inbox

tools.name: relay.send
tools.description: Deliver a message to another instance's file mailbox by id

tools.name: session.create
tools.description: Start a session, return id, persist as .rvf

tools.name: session.fork
tools.description: COW-branch a session for parallel exploration

tools.name: session.resume
tools.description: Restore a session by id (full context + memory)

tools.name: swarm.assign
tools.description: Assign a task to a swarm member and persist the handoff

tools.name: swarm.complete
tools.description: Mark a swarm as completed and persist its final summary

tools.name: swarm.create
tools.description: Create a durable swarm with topology, roles, and objective

tools.name: swarm.fail
tools.description: Mark a swarm as failed with a recorded reason

tools.name: swarm.health
tools.description: Report swarm liveness, utilization, and freshness

tools.name: swarm.heartbeat
tools.description: Refresh a swarm member heartbeat and liveness state

tools.name: swarm.join
tools.description: Add or reactivate a swarm member

tools.name: swarm.leave
tools.description: Mark a swarm member as left

tools.name: swarm.message
tools.description: Send a message between swarm members or broadcast to the swarm

tools.name: swarm.metrics
tools.description: Return numeric swarm health and throughput metrics

tools.name: swarm.rebalance
tools.description: Move tasks off stale swarm members onto live members

tools.name: swarm.report
tools.description: Generate a swarm summary with recent activity

tools.name: swarm.status
tools.description: Inspect the active swarm membership and progress

hooks.name: pre-task
hooks.fires_on: Before any Claude Code task start

hooks.name: post-edit
hooks.fires_on: After file write/edit (codemod tier + learning signal)
